name: Zoya
description: **Height:** 175 cm Zoya is a new maid at the Oinky Doink Cafe. Growing up in the former Soviet Union, she was forbidden to touch and play with cute things by her strict parents. She becomes a maid in Japan following the collapse of the Soviet Union but struggles to cope with the life in Japan before meeting Ranko.

name: Cecil Aijima
description: __Height:__ 177 cm __Instrument:__ Flute Introduces himself as a "prince" from Agna Palace (Agnapolis?); where the people are servants of the goddess of music, Muse. ~! He is cursed to turn into a cat, which Haruka named 'Kuppuru'. He falls in love with Haruka from the first time he met her. While not officially a student at Saotome Academy, he later joins the rank of an S-Class participant, and becomes Camus' student. Minor issues are that Cecil is scared of dogs, and apparently cannot swim. Th

name: Collei
description: __Origin:__ Sumeru __Constellation:__ Leptailurus Cervarius Originally a victim of Fatui human experimentation, Collei wandered the world as a vagrant until she met [Amber](https://anilist.co/character/190866) in Mondstadt. Since then, Collei has turned her life around, and currently serves as a trainee Forest Ranger in the Avidya Forest. A Trainee Forest Ranger who is under the tutelage of Tighnari. name: Daigo Tsuwabuki
description: Daigo Tsuwabuki is a skilled Pokémon trainer who is often shown as the champion of the Hoenn region's Pokémon League. The son of the president of Devon Corporation, Steven resides in Mossdeep City but usually spends his time wandering around Hoenn, enjoying his hobby of collecting rare stones. He specializes in Steel-type Pokémon, with his ace being a Metagross that can Mega Evolve.
mediaTitles: Pokémon the Series: Ruby and Sapphire
searchTerms: Pokémon the Series: Ruby and Sapphire

name: Dark Mousy
description: Dark is the entity passed on to each new male in the Niwa generation at the age of 14, once said male experiences love. He was dormant for 40 years due to the fact that Daisuke's grandfather (who was Dark's host before Daisuke) had no male offspring. It is not possible for females to be the Phantom Thief. He is the phantom thief who constantly steals art pieces made by the Hikari family. Unlike Daisuke, who likes Risa, Dark fell in love with Riku. However, he is constantly being pursued by Risa,

name: Duke Seeker
description: The first prince of Durkiss. He is known to have a cool demeanor and and rarely smiles at anyone.

name: Enkrid
description: Enkrid is the protagonist of The Knight Only Lives Today. He possesses a curse which turns him back in time every time he dies to a “wall”.

name: Gakupo Kamui
description: __Developer:__ Internet Co, Ltd. __Release Date:__ 7/31/2008 Kamui Gakupo was the first Vocaloid released by Internet Co, Ltd. Gackt was used as a voice provider after he was recommended to them by another company as a singer who was often cooperative (as Internet Co, Ltd thought that it would be difficult to get a singer to use their voice for a Vocaloid). name: Hakufu Sonsaku
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'3") The protagonist of the series, busty, light red haired and green-eyed and not terribly bright, but immeasurably powerful. Hakufu cares little for the politics of the series, only caring about fighting for the sake of fighting, but is staunchly against unnecessary violence and killing. Lately, however, with trouble brewing all around her she is beginning to take up the mantle of a leader to protect her friends and family. Hakufu possesses a unique gift for predicting ene

name: Haruka Sakurai
description: __Height:__ 174 cm __Status:__ Prisoner No.001 A quiet young prisoner who's normally always looking at the ground. At first, he would only respond to Es’s questions with a word or two. But as he starts to open up more through conversation, he slowly starts to become more talkative. When you're able to communicate with him properly, you can see his true personality: a kind and gentle person. He is mild-mannered and does not seem to dislike being in MILGRAM. He tries to converse with Es and the ot

name: Hibari
description: __Height:__ 160 cm A first year of the group, she is very childish and clumsy and loves cute and sweet things. She is also really close to Yagyuu. Her summoning animal is a large pink rabbit. ~!Unlike the other girls of the cast, Hibari is the only one not to have a tragic or sad past.!~
mediaTitles: Senran Kagura: Estival Versus - Festival Eve Full of Swimsuits
searchTerms: Senran Kagura: Estival Versus - Festival Eve Full of Swimsuits

name: Jinx
description: A manic and impulsive criminal from Zaun, Jinx lives to wreak havoc without care for the consequences. With an arsenal of deadly weapons, she unleashes the loudest blasts and brightest explosions to leave a trail of mayhem and panic in her wake. Jinx despises boredom and gleefully brings her own chaotic brand of pandemonium wherever she goes.

name: Kairi
description: ~!__Birthplace:__ Radiant Garden!~ Kairi is a charismatic and mysterious young girl, she lives on Destiny Islands along with her two best friends, Sora and Riku. ~!Kairi is revealed to be one of the Princesses of Heart, a maiden whose heart holds no darkness, and is needed to open the Final Keyhole.!~ ~!Kairi is the original persona of Naminé.!~

name: Kei Ashida
description: A tomboyish girl and Aika Natsukawa's best friend, also a member of the Kōetsu High Volleyball Club. She's often seen wearing hoodies during High School. She has a cheerful personality and secretly supports the relationship that has been going between Aika and Wataru. Although Wataru didn't seems to notice this, it has been proven by her actions. She is a typical best friend who always watching Aika and comforts her whenever she faced undesired circumstances.
mediaTitles: The Dreaming Boy is a Realist
searchTerms: The Dreaming Boy is a Realist

name: Mai Ninomiya
description: Mai Ninomiya is Tsuneo's underclassman at the same diving shop where he works part-time.
mediaTitles: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish
searchTerms: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish

name: Manabu Itagaki
description: The most recent addition to the roster, the charming Manabu has a prodigy's talent and was the captain of his high school's boxing team. Cheerful and a lover of bad puns, Manabu is a fierce outboxer with extremely high speed and reflexes and whose fighting style is uncanny in its resemblance to Miyata's. His most powerful technique is a furious hail of mid-power blows known as the Hedgehog or Porcupine, which was employed in an East Japan Rookie Kings showdown with his longtime nemesis, Kyosuke
mediaTitles: Hajime no Ippo: The Fighting! New Challenger
Hajime No Ippo: The Fighting! - Rising -

Hajime No Ippo: The Fighting! - Rising -

name: Maruna
description: Maruna is a sura from the Garuda clan and the eldest living child of Garuda, the clan's king. Early on in the series, he assists Gandharva and searches for his siblings in the human realm. ~!Since his father, the King, is currently in a coma, he has the temporary authority to command the suras of his clan.!~

name: Meme Touwa
description: Meme is Makoto's aunt and Erio's mother. She also goes under the name Jojo and is an owner of a store that sells sweets. She is cheerful and can often be seen teasing Makoto by attempting to seduce him. She has no plans on getting married and has a happy life with her daughter Erio and her nephew Makoto. She allows Erio to stay home from school and do as she pleases. She explained to Makoto that it was the only effective way to deal with her daughter's eccentricities.
mediaTitles: Ground Control to Psychoelectric Girl: The Nighttime Sun
searchTerms: Ground Control to Psychoelectric Girl: The Nighttime Sun

name: Misa Ilioroagu
description: **Misa Ilioroagu** is Anos' classmate, and shows herself as skeptical about the current society in which pure-blooded demons are favored. ~!She is the spirit that was formed from the rumors and traditions of the fictional Demon King Avos Dilhevia!~ ~!She is the daughter of Great Spirit Reno and Spirit King Shin Regalia.!~

name: Nagi Arisuin
description: Kurogane Shizuku's close friend and roomate. Alice likes to give Ikki advice from time to time, and is very interested in how he is developing over time. Alice identifies as a woman, and prefers the name Alice to "Nagi". Her friends call her Alice as well. Alice's Device is Darkness Hermit and her Noble Art is Shadow Bind. Her device allows Alice to create shadow portals that enable her to travel from one place to another. It also immobilizes opponents by pinning them down by their shadow.

name: Naomi Katagaki
description: Katagaki Naomi is an ordinary high school student and especially doesn't have any social skills. He is usually seen reading novel books, but he gets to a point where he wanted some friends. His shy type of personality had eventually made him a loner. Naomi's failed attempts garnered him no friends even in his class, except Ichigyou Ruri. ~!He eventually ends up dating Ichigyou Ruri.!~

name: Nio Hashiri
description: Hashiri Nio is an energetic and upbeat girl with a knack for peeping into other people's businesses. Despite being a part of the Black Class group, she is also affiliated with the academy in some way.
mediaTitles: Akuma no Riddle: Riddle Story of Devil
searchTerms: Akuma no Riddle: Riddle Story of Devil
